response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with over 15 years in the industry, meeting the minimum experience requirement. His recent work at Stripe on AI-agent infrastructure is directly relevant and promising. However, his experience is primarily at the Senior and Staff levels, which is a significant gap from the Director-level expectations of this Principal Engineer role. While he demonstrates technical leadership through mentorship and open-source work, the resume lacks evidence of defining high-level AI strategy, advising enterprise customers, or possessing the recognized AI expertise required by the position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems.
Recent, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at a leading tech company (Stripe).
Demonstrates leadership and a passion for sharing knowledge through founding open-source projects and conducting technical workshops.
concerns: Lacks experience at the Director/Principal level; the leap from Staff Engineer to a Director-level IC is substantial.
Limited evidence of defining high-level, cross-organizational AI strategy, a core responsibility of the role.
The majority of his career has been in general software engineering, with deep AI-specific experience appearing to be very recent.
